The '''Siege of Ank Ki'Shor''' occurred early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="TNEGtVaV" /><ref name="FF" /><ref name="DB" /> The industrial planet [[Ank Ki'Shor]] was targeted by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] because it was a key supplier to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] in its formative years. During the battle, the Rebel forces made a show of force with their [[BTL Y-wing starfighter/Legends|Y-wing starfighters]] to defend the population against Imperial bombardment.<ref name="Xim Week" /> The good use of these fighters saved countless thousands of lives by holding off Imperial [[TIE/sa tactical bomber/Legends|TIE bombers]].<ref name="TEGtVaV" /><ref name="TNEGtVaV" /><ref name="FF" /><ref name="DB" /> The Empire was eventually victorious.<ref name="TEA" />
